title: pseuderanthemum tenellum
intro: Pseuderanthemum tenellum, also known as the 'Dwarf Needle Flower' or 'Needle-Flower Plant', is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. It has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Pseuderanthemum tenellum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
